steps.title: Add x to both sides
steps.content:
Adding $x$ to both sides gives:
$$13x + x = 42$$
which simplifies to:
$$14x = 42$$

steps.title: Divide both sides by 14
steps.content:
Divide both sides by \$14$:
$$x = \frac{42}{14}$$
Simplify the fraction:
$$x = 3$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
